---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Project MT

* [1. Cellbender vs. Raw Data QC Comparison](Checking_Cellbender.html)
* [2. QC](QC.html)
* [3. Clustering and Annotation](Dim_Reduction.html)
* [4. Celltype Proportions](Proportions.html)
* [5. CM Subtypes](CM_Subtypes.html)
* [6. Macrophages Subset](Macrophage_subset_DGEA.html)
* [7.0 Fibroblast Comparisons](Fibroblast_Comparisons.html)
* [7.1 Fibroblast Subset DGEA Overview](DGEA.html)
* [7.1.1 Fibroblast Subset: Baseline TGF-B Response](Baseline_TGF_Response.html)
* [7.1.2 Fibroblast Subset: Modulated TGF-B Response](Modulated_TGF_Response.html)
* [7.1.3 Fibroblast Subset: Baseline Macrophage Response](Baseline_Mac_Response.html)
* [7.1.4 Fibroblast Subset: Stimulated Macrophage Response](Stim_Mac_Response.html)
* [7.2 Fibroblast Comparisons DEG Ovelap](Fibroblasts_DEG_Overlap.html)
